tr.td: 25 micrograms per hour, apply one patch every 72 hours
Acetaminophen 300 mg and hydrocodone bitartrate 5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg/5 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
Oxycodone hydrochloride 10 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Acetaminophen 325 mg and oxycodone hydrochloride 10 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg/10 mg) by mouth every 6 hours as needed for pain
Hydrocodone bitartrate 10 mg and ibuprofen 200 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (10 mg/200 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Live attenuated Human alphaherpesvirus 3 only vaccine product
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs

ul.li: Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight to support glycemic control.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week to improve insulin sensitivity.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
